description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical head with a symmetrical design, capped at both ends with beige-colored bands that provide visual contrast to the dark gray body. The head is thick and solid, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty striking, similar to a sledgehammer. The handle is long, straight, and reinforced with beige rings at intervals, likely for added grip and structural integrity. The handle's surface appears smooth with a subtle metallic sheen, and it is capped at the base with a matching beige end. The overall construction looks sturdy and industrial, suitable for demanding urban tasks such as demolition or construction. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments, giving it a clean and utilitarian appearance.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a thick, cylindrical gray head and a long, straight handle reinforced with beige bands. The design is robust and industrial, ideal for urban construction or demolition tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the cylindrical hammer head and the straight handle with beige reinforcement rings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded end of the hammer head and the narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical head and handle structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rounded end of the head and the slim handle profile.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely metal with smooth surface, reinforced with beige plastic or rubber rings for grip enhancement.
attribute_head_type: Thick, cylindrical sledge-type head with flat striking faces on both ends, no claws or peen features.
